nasb.text: for I will indeed honor you richly, and I will do whatever you say to me. Please come then, curse this people for me.’ ”

esv.text: for I will surely do you great honor, and whatever you say to me I will do. Come, curse this people for me.’”

cnv.text: 因為我必使你大得尊榮；你向我說甚麼，我都照辦；只求你替我咒詛這民。’”

ccb.text: 他必有重赏。你要什么都可以，只求你去为他咒诅那民族。”
